NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator.​DateTimeConverter
JsonConverter​<DateTime>
public
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator.​DateTimeConverter

Class to convert DateTime to universal time when serializing and then convert to local time when unserializing so that time zones are always written.  From: https://​github​.com​/dotnet​/runtime​/issues​/1566

Functions
Read
public override DateTime Read(
ref 
Utf8JsonReader 
reader,
Type 
typeToConvert,
JsonSerializerOptions 
options
)

Utf8JsonWriter 
writer,
DateTime

JsonSerializerOptions 
options
)
